naming_law: public copy says 'calls'; every referral program fact interpolates from src/lib/referral-constants.ts REFERRAL_TERMS label fns — zero hardcoded literals (renderer source grep-gated by tests/unit/referral-pages.test.ts)

served_on: https://algovault.com/referral — apex, via Caddyfile `handle /referral { reverse_proxy localhost:3000 }` (same mechanism as /track-record); the canonical, on-brand, indexable surface the footer + other channels link to
https://api.algovault.com/referral — api origin, direct (Express); same bytes
surfaces.index_contract: <meta name="robots" content="index,follow"> (a discovery/share surface, UNLIKE the noindex /referral-terms page); apex robots.txt is `Allow: /` (only /dashboard + /.well-known disallowed) so the apex URL is crawlable
surfaces.wave_update: REFERRAL-FREE-KEY-SIGNUP-W1 (2026-06-21): the inline free-account email form is now the PRIMARY entry (POSTs same-origin /api/signup-email, apex-proxied) → instant referral link + emailed key; the absolute-api /account link is now the 'already have a key' fallback.
surfaces.link_origin_contract: served on the APEX (algovault.com/referral) so relative hrefs resolve to the apex: /account is api-canonical (Stripe success_url from request host; NOT apex-served) -> ABSOLUTE https://api.algovault.com/account; /referral-terms is proxied onto the apex (Caddy handle /referral-terms) -> relative OK; start-free -> absolute apex #quickstart. Regression guard: NO bare href="/account" (would 404 on the apex).
surfaces.forbidden_substrings_extra: href="/account" (apex-relative app link would 404 — must be absolute api)

must_contain_sot_interpolated.note: present-but-DRIFT-TOLERANT — these render from referral-constants label fns; value correctness is asserted in the unit test, NOT pinned here, so a legitimate SoT change (e.g. commission 30%→35%) does not false-fail this snapshot

surfaces.error_contract: renderReferralLandingPage() is a pure HTML-string renderer with no DB/Stripe/HTTP — the route effectively always returns 200 text/html; an unexpected throw falls through to Express' default 500
surfaces.cache_contract: no explicit Cache-Control on the Express route (apex /referral is proxied, so it does NOT inherit the static catch-all's max-age=60); content is static per deploy
surfaces.drift_check_command: curl -s https://algovault.com/referral | grep -qE 'Refer a friend' && curl -s https://algovault.com/referral | grep -q 'content="index,follow"' && curl -s https://algovault.com/referral | grep -q '<form id="av-ref-form"' && ! curl -s https://algovault.com/referral | grep -qE 'outcome_(return_pct|price)|content="noindex"'
